reviews.comment:
ACA Villa La Angostura excelente atención humana, especialmente el responsable de la playa Santiago ayudándonos a cambiar una rueda (al no contar por ser domingo por ningún lado ) y las chicas de atención a YPF Full cafetería quienes  articularon la solucion de ayuda .
Gracias ACA Villa La Angostura !

(Translated by Google)
ACA Villa La Angostura provided excellent customer service, especially Santiago, the manager at the gas station, who helped us change a tire (since it was Sunday, no one was doing that), and the staff at the YPF Full cafeteria who coordinated our assistance.
Thank you, ACA Villa La Angostura!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGdFlYcjNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio, más cuando se es extranjero, el lugar horrendo, sucio y además pésimo en su atención, no les gusta entregar la boleta, el operario de la estación pésimo lenguaje y uniforme todo sucio

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, especially for foreigners. The place is horrendous and dirty, and the staff is awful; they don't like to give out receipts. The station attendant uses terrible language and his uniform is filthy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1NnV5VUdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, agilidad en la misma, a pesar de la cantidad de vehículos. Baños en perfectas condiciones. Con la seguridad del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent and efficient service, despite the number of vehicles. Restrooms in perfect condition. With the security of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
